title: Group by with having + aggregate filter
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.categories_with_many_posts/1` that takes a `min_count` integer and returns categories with at least `min_count` published posts. Use a join, group by category id+name, `having: count(p.id) >= ^min_count`. Select `{c.id, c.name, count(p.id)}`. Pin `min_count`. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Combines group_by + having + pinned threshold + where filter. Several pieces.
